message:
test(core): proptest ingest telemetry counter suite (ft-3kxe.8)

Add 349-line property-based test suite validating IngestTelemetry and
StreamIngester counters:

- IngestTelemetry starts at zero, snapshot serde roundtrip
- PaneRegistry discovery_tick increments counter correctly
- Pane close detection counted when pane omitted from tick
- Generation change detection on title change
- Property: counters monotonically increase across arbitrary tick sequences
- Property: panes_discovered equals cumulative sum of new_panes from diffs
- Property: panes_closed equals cumulative sum of closed_panes from diffs
- Property: IngestTelemetrySnapshot serde roundtrip for arbitrary values
- StreamIngester telemetry starts at zero
- StreamIngester counts segments on OutputData events
- StreamIngester counts gaps on overflow events (GAP + delta = 3 segments)
- StreamIngesterTelemetrySnapshot serde roundtrip
- Property: stream segments/gaps monotonically increase across event sequences

Uses proptest with controlled case counts (32-64) for fast CI execution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
